segments.text: Lesson 119.
A True Story.

translations.zh-Hans: 一个真实的故事。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer this question.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

segments.text: Who called out to the thieves in the dark?

translations.zh-Hans: 黑暗中是谁向小偷喊话？

segments.text: Do you like stories?

translations.zh-Hans: 你喜欢故事吗？

segments.text: I want to tell you a true story.

translations.zh-Hans: 我想给你讲一个真实的故事。

segments.text: It happened to a friend of mine a year ago.

translations.zh-Hans: 这件事一年前发生在我的一个朋友身上。

segments.text: While my friend, George, was reading in bed, two thieves climbed into his kitchen.

translations.zh-Hans: 我的朋友乔治躺在床上看书时，两个小偷爬进了他的厨房。

segments.text: After they had entered the house, they went into the dining room.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们进入房子后，走进了餐厅。

segments.text: It was very dark, so they turned on a torch.

translations.zh-Hans: 里面很黑，所以他们打开了一支手电筒。

segments.text: Suddenly, they heard a voice behind them.

translations.zh-Hans: 突然，他们听到身后有个声音。

segments.text: What's up?

translations.zh-Hans: “怎么了？

segments.text: What's up?

translations.zh-Hans: 怎么了？”

segments.text: Someone called.

translations.zh-Hans: 有人喊道。

segments.text: The thieves dropped the torch and ran away as quickly as they could.

translations.zh-Hans: 小偷扔下手电筒，飞快地逃走了。

segments.text: George heard the noise and came downstairs quickly.

translations.zh-Hans: 乔治听到响声，迅速下了楼。

segments.text: He turned on the light, but he couldn't see anyone.

translations.zh-Hans: 他打开灯，但一个人也没看见。

segments.text: The thieves had already gone.

translations.zh-Hans: 小偷早已逃走了。

segments.text: But George's parrot, Henry, was still there.

translations.zh-Hans: 但乔治的鹦鹉亨利还在那里。

segments.text: What's up, George?

translations.zh-Hans: “怎么了，乔治？”

segments.text: He called.

translations.zh-Hans: 它叫道。

segments.text: Nothing, Henry, George said and smiled.

translations.zh-Hans: “没什么，亨利。”乔治笑着说，

segments.text: Go back to sleep.

translations.zh-Hans: “回去睡觉吧。”
